channel.title: Download free software, update daily!
channel.description: Taiwebs.com - Download free software applications, full version, latest updates!

item.title: Download MiniMeters 1.0.28.233
item.description: MiniMeters is a simple standalone sound meter application for Windows. Monitor your System Audio*, Any Input, or insert the MiniMeter Server Plug-in (VST3/AU/CLAP) at the end of your main channel in the DAW of your choice. Customize the layout in a horizontal bar (perfect for above or below the audio engine of your choice) or pop out into modules to create custom layouts. Features of MiniMeters 6 modules to choose from to build your perfect metering setup: Spectrogram, Waveform,...

item.title: Download LizardSystems Terminal Services Manager 26.03.16

You can send messages to users, disconnect them from the server or connect remotely with their sessions. item.title: Download Symless Synergy Business 3.6.0
item.description: Symless Synergy Business is the enterprise version of Synergy software from Symless, designed to share a keyboard and mouse across multiple computers on a local network. It offers maximum stability, security features such as TLS/SSL encryption, and compatibility with enterprise environments, used by 26% of Fortune 1000 companies, including Google and Amazon. Key Features: Instant mouse/keyboard switching with no hardware KVM latency, plus clipboard sharing on Windows, macOS, and...

item.title: Download HDD Raw Copy Tool 2.2
item.description: HDD Raw Copy Tool is software that creates exact copies of SATA, IDE, SAS, SCSI or SSD hard drives. It can create sector-by-sector copies of all sectors of the hard drive (MBR, boot record, all partitions as well as the space in between). Additionally, HDD Raw Copy Tool can create accurate raw (dd) or compressed images of the entire media (including service data such as MBR, Boot Record, etc.). Features of HDD Raw Copy Tool Data recovery: make a copy of the damaged drive to attempt...

item.title: Download APU Software APU Loudness Series 5.3.0
item.description: APU Software recently made important updates to its Loudness Series, including APU Loudness Meter, APU Loudness Compressor, APU Dynamics Optimizer, APU Loudness Limiter. APU Loudness Compressor is a compressor/expander designed to support modern loudness types (LUFS, True Peak). The result is a compressor with a more transparent sound. The compressor is also capable of operating in a more traditional way, using RMS and Peak measurement units, so you can have your cake and eat it too....
